name: vscode-window-flash-notify-relay
description: 从 workspace localhost 接收通知并转发给本地 UI 扩展 / Relay workspace localhost notifications to the local UI extension.

commands.title: 窗口闪烁通知 Relay: 复制 Curl 命令 / Window Flash Notify Relay: Copy Curl Command
窗口闪烁通知 Relay: 测试闪烁 / Window Flash Notify Relay: Test Flash

configuration.title: 窗口闪烁通知 Relay / Window Flash Notify Relay

windowFlashNotifyRelay.basePort.description: 启动 workspace 通知 HTTP server 时首先尝试的端口。/ First port to try when starting the workspace notification HTTP server.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.portSearchRange.description: 从 windowFlashNotifyRelay.basePort 开始尝试的端口数量。/ Number of ports to try, starting from windowFlashNotifyRelay.basePort.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.listenHost.description: workspace HTTP server 的绑定地址。保持 127.0.0.1 可限制为同一 workspace 机器上的 hook 本地访问。/ Host address for the workspace HTTP server. Keep 127.0.0.1 for local-only access from hooks running in the same workspace machine.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.authToken.description: 可选鉴权 token，可通过 X-Window-Flash-Token header 或 token query 参数传入。/ Optional token required in the X-Window-Flash-Token header or token query parameter.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.writePortFile.description: 向每个 workspace folder 写入 .vscode/window-flash-notify-port.json，方便脚本发现 relay server。/ Write .vscode/window-flash-notify-port.json into each workspace folder for scripts to discover the relay server.
